title: HTTP Basic Authentication Middleware Config
description: Configuration for the HTTP Basic authentication middleware plugin (RFC 7617)

realm.description: The authentication realm shown in the WWW-Authenticate challenge

strip_credentials.description: Remove the Authorization header before forwarding to upstream

credentials.description: List of credential entries (username, password, and optional roles)

password.description: Password for this user. Supports secret references (e.g. env://MY_PASSWORD).
